calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for Janet Holcomb (Petitioner/Administrator).

Mr. Bonanno stated that the car was sold for $600.00 which was used for expenses, that the personal property was not of any significant value and that it was all distributed before the probate came about. Mr. Bonanno also stated that there was only one Creditor's Claim by the Administrator, that she withdrew it, that the Son of the Decedent has expressed no interest and that the Son received the "pay on death" accounts. The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Administration of the Estate, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Terminate Administration Of Estate And For Discharge Of Administrator
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Terminate Administration Of Estate And For Discharge Of Administrator
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for Janet Holcomb.

Mr. Bonanno stated that by agreement of the Administrator they filed a Petition to Terminate Administration of the Estate under Probate Code 12251 with a hearing date of October 1, 2014. Mr. Bonanno also requested that the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel be continued to that same date. The accounting status report was taken off calendar. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel was continued to October 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonnano for the petitioner.

Mr. Bonnano has requested a continuance stating that he has prepared and drafted the petition for termination of administration of estate. The motion to be relieved and counsel and status of the accounting was continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jul-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for and with Janet Holcomb.

Mr. Bonanno stated that they are trying to work things out and then petition for termination of the proceeding for lack of assets. The Motion to Be Releived As Counsel and the status hearing were continued to July 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jul-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for and with Janet Holcomb.

Ms. Holcomb requested to be allowed to represent herself. The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel and status on filing of the accounting were continued to June 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to get a substition of attorney filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Off Calendar

Petition By Administrator For Court Allowance Of Creditor'S Claim Filed By Administrator (Probate Code Sec 9352(A); San Francisco Local Rule 14.56b)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonnano for and with Janet Holcomb (Petitioner). Jeralyn Spradlin for and with James Holcomb.

Ms. Spradlin presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the $50,000.00 Creditor's Claim. The Petition for Court Allowance of Creditor's Claim was taken under submission. Mr. Bonanno provided a revised order in open Court which was reviewed by Ms. Spradlin.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition By Administrator For Court Allowance Of Creditor'S Claim Filed By Administrator (Probate Code Sec 9352(A); San Francisco Local Rule 14.56b)
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Continued To Aug-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
